title: ValoCraft
description: This Minecraft plugin will transform your server into Valorant.
body:
![banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/stimoi/main-zyrahost/refs/heads/main/Gemini_Generated_Image_7na82p7na82p7na8.png)
# 🔫 **ValoCraft** - Turn Minecraft into Valorant!

> **Version:** 1.4.1  
> **Author:** sti_moi  
> **API:** Paper 1.21x  
> **Type:** PvP / Competitive

---

## 🎮 **Description**

**ValoCraft** is a comprehensive Minecraft plugin that transforms your server into a Valorant-style experience. Choose your agent, buy your weapons, and face off against your opponents in intense tactical combat!

### ⭐ **Download Goal**
- 10 downloads : 👍
- 50 downloads : 👍 (06/04/26)
- 100 downloads : 👍 (06/05/26)

### ⭐ **Key Features**

---

## 🥷 **Agent System**

**6 unique agents** with special abilities inspired by Valorant:

| Agent | Role | Special Abilities |
|-------|------|-------------------|
| 🔥 **Phoenix** | Duelist | 🌟 Burning Hands • 🌀 Flash Orb • 🔥 Wall of Fire |
| 🌪️ **Jett** | Duelist | 💨 Tailwind • 🌪️ Updraft • ⚡ Blade Storm |
| 🌸 **Sage** | Sentinel | 💚 Barrier Orb • 🌸 Slow Orb • ✨ Resurrection |
| 👁️ **Reyna** | Duelist | 👁️ Dismiss • 💖 Devour • 🔮 Empress |
| 🌑 **Omen** | Controller | 🌑 Shrouded Step • 🌊 Paranoia • 🌀 Dark Cover |
| 💥 **Raze** | Duelist | 💣 Blast Pack • 🚀 Paint Shells • 💥 Showstopper |

---

## 🔫 **Revolutionary Weapon System**

### **🎯 Realistic Physical Bullets**
- **Real visible bullets** with ballistic trajectory
- **Unique visual effects** per weapon type
- Immersive **firing and impact sounds**
- **Real damage** based on the weapon used

### **🏪 Complete Arsenal**
| Category | Weapons | Price | Features |
|-----------|-------|------|-----------------|
| 🔪 **Knife** | Knife | **Free** | Melee damage, always equipped |
| 🔫 **Pistols** | Classic • Ghost • Sheriff | 0¢ • 500¢ • 800¢ | Medium speed, accurate |
| 🏃 **SMG** | Spectre • Stinger | 1600¢ • 1100¢ | High rate of fire, moderate damage |
| 🎯 **Rifles** | Phantom • Vandal • Guardian | 2900¢ • 2900¢ • 2250¢ | Powerful, accurate, recoil |

---

## 💰 **Economic System**

- **💵 Valorant Credits**: 800¢ starting balance
- **🎁 Kill Bonus**: +200¢ per kill
- **🛒 Shop GUI**: Intuitive purchasing interface
- **🔄 Round Economy**: Lose purchased weapons upon respawn

---

## 🎨 **User Interface**

### **Elegant GUI**
- **🎭 Agent Selector**: Choose your champion
- **🏪 Weapon Shop**: Purchase your equipment
- **📊 HUD Display**: Real-time information

### **🎯 Visual Feedback**
- **Custom particles** for each ability
- **Immersive sounds** for in-game actions
- Informative **action messages**
- Visual **recoil effects**

---

## ⚙️ **Configuration & Performance**

### **🚀 Optimizations**
- Smart **cooldown system**
- **Automatic cleanup** of projectiles
- Optimized **memory management**
- Optimized **Bukkit events**

### **🔧 Customization**
- **Fixed inventory slots**:
  - Slot 0: Primary weapon (SMG/Rifle)
  - Slot 1: Pistol
  - Slot 8: Knife (always present)
- **Speed modifiers** depending on the weapon equipped
- **Balanced cooldowns** for competitive gameplay

---

## 📋 **Commands**

| Command | Alias | Description |
|----------|-------|-------------|
| `/valocraft agent-selector` | `/vc agent` | Opens the agent selector |
| `/valocraft shop` | `/vc shop` | Opens the weapon shop |
| `/valocraft credits` | `/vc money` | View your credits |
| `/valocraft give <weapon>` | `/vc give` | Gives a weapon (admin) |

---

## 🎯 **Why ValoCraft?**

### **🏆 Competitive Experience**
- **Tactical gameplay** inspired by Valorant
- **Carefully balanced** weapons and abilities
- Strategic **economic progression**

### **🎮 Total Immersion**
- **Agents with unique personalities**
- **Weapons with realistic behavior**
- High-quality **visual and sound effects**

### **🔧 Ease of Use**
- **Simple installation**: drop-in plugin
- **Minimal configuration** required
- **Compatible** with most servers

---

## 📦 **Installation**

1. **Download** the `ValoCraft-1.1.1.jar` file
2. **Place it** in your `plugins/` folder
3. **Restart** your server
4. **Enjoy** the Valorant experience!

---

## 🔗 **Support**

- **Minecraft version**: 1.21.1 (Paper recommended)
- **Dependencies**: None (standalone)
- **Performance**: Optimized for 20+ players

---

> **⚡ Turn your Minecraft server into a tactical combat arena!**
> 
> **ValoCraft**: The Valorant experience you've been waiting for in Minecraft.

---

*Made by sti_moi*
